Class JModality

java.lang.Object
org.key_project.logic.op.AbstractOperator
org.key_project.logic.op.AbstractSortedOperator
org.key_project.logic.op.Modality
de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op.JModality
All Implemented Interfaces:
Named, Operator, SortedOperator, Sorted, SyntaxElement
public class JModality extends Modality implements Operator
This class is used to represent a dynamic logic modality like diamond and box (but also extensions of DL like preserves and throughout are possible in the future).

  • Method Details

    • getModality

      public static JModality getModality(JModality.JavaModalityKind kind, JavaBlock jb)
      Retrieves the modality of the given kind and program.
      Parameters:
      kind - the kind of the modality such as diamond or box
      jb - the program of this modality
      Returns:
      the modality of the given kind and program.

    • programBlock

      public @NonNull JavaBlock programBlock()
      Description copied from class: Modality
      The program contained in this modality.
      Specified by:
      programBlock in class Modality
      Returns:
      the program.

    • transaction

      public boolean transaction()
      Whether this is a transaction modality

    • additionalValidTopLevel

      protected <T extends Term> void additionalValidTopLevel(T p_term)

    • validTopLevelException

      public void validTopLevelException(Term term) throws TermCreationException
      Description copied from class: AbstractOperator
      Checks whether the top level structure of the given @link Term is syntactically valid, given the assumption that the top level operator of the term is the same as this Operator. The assumption that the top level operator and the term are equal is NOT checked.
      Specified by:
      validTopLevelException in interface Operator
      Overrides:
      validTopLevelException in class AbstractOperator
      Throws:
      TermCreationException - if a construction error was recognised
